prompt: I want to add a new tool window to the flutter-intellij plugin that shows the current Flutter device list and updates in real time. How do I register a tool window in plugin.xml, implement the ToolWindowFactory, and keep the content up to date when the device list changes? Show me the plugin.xml declaration, the factory class skeleton, and how to use the MessageBus to react to device change events.

assertions.text: Shows a plugin.xml <toolWindow> extension point declaration with id, factoryClass, and anchor attributes
Shows a ToolWindowFactory implementation with createToolWindowContent() method using ContentFactory
Shows MessageBus subscription with project.getMessageBus().connect() and a Disposable parent to avoid leaks
Mentions that UI updates must happen on the EDT (invokeLater or similar) since callbacks arrive on background threads
